name: Kit
description:
Your host, Mel Hein, would like to present to you all the first piece of shit I selected! He mentioned making this on his recent Grimoire bot, so I feel like it's relevant enough to show off.

Time to ridicule this piece of garbage. So, first off... What the hell is up with that personality section? I mean the dude seriously wrote the same thing several times. We get it, Kit is loyal.

Another complaint... why? Why is this made? There is nothing to this. It's just so bland. Was this fox butler made just to be tortured and take it without complaint? Or was this meant for wholesome RPs where he gets headpats?

I don't know and I don't care. I probably put more thought into this than whoever designed this joke. Whatever. I'll give Voidsong the benefit of the doubt on his intentions and tag this as fluff. And smut, just in case.

Apparently, Voidsong keeps his definitions open. I was hoping to leave the definitions open here just to piss him off. But apparently, he already does that. Ugh, whatever...
creator: Voidslop
